subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who remembereth His people at a time when sorrows have encompassed Him from near and far [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یذکر امته حین الذی احاطته الاحزان من طرف قریب و بعید علی شان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @presence of; reunion with God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
